Diagnostic check: Alternative inference for the direct effect (WCR)
Motivation: Assess whether inference changes under few-cluster methods
Result: WCR p=0.136 versus Tosun's (2026) event-study p=0.0015
Interpretation: Lower precision reflects the simplified pooled specification rather than a failure to replicate the estimates reported by Tosun (2026)
